description: Balanced local resilience across liquidity workforce supply digital public capacity community wealth equity inequality risk and implementation burden.
Prioritizes emergency liquidity cash runway fair credit and working capital.
Prioritizes workforce capacity job quality childcare transit training and owner recovery.
Prioritizes local procurement supplier resilience anchor institution access and community wealth circulation.
Prioritizes digital readiness cybersecurity payments online visibility and continuity of records.
Prioritizes local ownership cooperatives community finance anchor procurement and anti-displacement capacity.
Prioritizes historically excluded firms minority-owned firms immigrant-owned firms rural firms and neighborhood access to capital.
Penalizes implementation burden when administrative budget political technical or civic capacity is constrained.
